songs.title: Awkward Silence
feed: “Awkward Silence” by Stray Kids reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.

“Awkward Silence” by Stray Kids is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 380,737 total units.
